metadata.title: APM GCC High CUI Enclave Security Plan (OSCAL)

system-characteristics.description: Primary enclave: GCC High (Entra ID USGov, EXO/SPO/Teams), Azure Government (Sentinel, project file share). Edge: FortiGate 100F. RMM: NinjaOne for Government on CUI laptops only. Engineering uses Azure DevOps Government for IaC; ControlBot gates Terraform PRs.

information-types.title: Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI)
information-types.description: CUI processed, stored, or transmitted by the in-scope system.

components.title: APM GCC High CUI Enclave
components.description: Atlas Precision Manufacturing (APM) machines vehicle components for an Army prime. CUI (CTI and export-controlled drawings) is processed only in a Microsoft 365 GCC High tenant, twelve Intune-managed Windows laptops, Azure Government file services, and Microsoft Sentinel. Commercial M365, corporate HR/finance, and IGEL thin-client VDI terminals are out of scope with documented separation. Paper CUI (marked CTI hardcopy, traveler drawings, mail pouches) is in scope for the CUI floor mail room, locked job boxes, and cross-cut destruction path; digital CUI remains in GCC High.

components.title: Microsoft 365 GCC High
components.description: Provider: Microsoft. FedRAMP: FedRAMP High (DISA IL5 PA). CRM: Microsoft 365 GCC High CIS/CRM Appendix J, 2026-03 edition

control-implementation.description: 800-53 Rev 5 control implementations derived from CMMC program data via references/data/800-53-crosswalk.json (NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 Appendix D). Validate with compliance-trestle or FedRAMP OSCAL tooling before submission.
